ticket.title: Create beta launch plan — first 100 users, channels, launch sequence
ticket.description: Define how we acquire the first 100 beta users, the channels, and the launch-week sequence.

code_agent.rationale: Code's scope picks up the project goal/PRD/credit terms; release plans and conventions are out of scope and Jordan's note is local. The agent build is in scope but irrelevant to a launch plan — optional.

qa_agent.rationale: QA's scope catches the two release entries; project/workspace entries are out of scope and Jordan's note is local. The agent build is in scope but irrelevant — optional.

design_agent.rationale: Design sees the goal/PRD/conventions/credit terms; release and codebase entries are out of scope, Jordan's note is local.

product_agent.rationale: Product is the strong role here: goal, both release plans, PRD, conventions, and credit terms; the agent build (codebase) is out of scope and Jordan's note is local.

human_teammate.rationale: Robin sees every team entry; only Jordan's local legal note is invisible to her.
